productDisplayName: Levis Men Boxer Navy Blue Trunks
description: Boxer briefs from Levi's in indigo and light grey, made of 95% combed cotton and 5% elastane for comfort, softness and stretch. Levi's name written on waistband and 'Levi Strauss & co' written across back. Slim white, green and red piping decorating side seams on front and back Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cold iron as needed Do not dry clean Levi's know how to deliver basics which are practical, comfortable and stylish. Choose Levi's for your inner wear to give you all day comfort. The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
